title: Anjaneya Temple, Nanganallur
tagline: Anjaneya Temple, Nanganallur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Anjaneya Temple at Nanganallur, Chennai is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Hanuman.
overview.description: The Anjaneya Temple at Nanganallur, Chennai is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Hanuman. The principal idol of Hanuman is 32-feet tall and sculpted from a single piece of granite, which the second tallest Hanuman after Panchavatee near Puducherry.

topPlaces.name: Adambakkam Lake
topPlaces.description: Adambakkam Lake is a lake in Chennai district, Tamil Nadu. This lake gives the name for the nearby locality of Chennai, the area of Adambakkam.

topPlaces.name: Adambakkam
topPlaces.description: Adambakkam is a neighbourhood of Chennai, India. It is primarily a residential locality situated in South Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Subramania Nagar
topPlaces.description: Subramania Nagar is a residential area within Madipakkam, a southern suburb of Chennai (formerly known as Madras), in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Nanganallur
topPlaces.description: Nanganallur or Nangainallur is one of the southern neighborhoods of Chennai, India. Since September 2011, it has become a part of Chennai Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Palavanthangal
topPlaces.description: Pazhavanthangal (also called Palavanthangal or "Pallhavanthangal") is a southern neighbourhood of Chennai, India. It is served by the Pazhavanthangal railway station of the Beach-Tambaram suburban railway route in Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Charnockite, St. Thomas Mount
topPlaces.description: Charnockite, St. Thomas Mount, located to the south of the Chennai city, in Pallavaram suburb, Tamil Nadu, is a characteristically profuse exposure of quartz–feldspar–hypersthene rock, illustrated by occurrence of two pyroxene facies metamorphism.

topPlaces.name: Radisson Blu Hotel Chennai
topPlaces.description: Radisson Blu is a five-star hotel in Chennai, India. It is located on GST Road at Meenambakkam.

topPlaces.name: Trident, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Trident, Chennai is a five-star hotel located on GST Road at Meenambakkam, Chennai, India, directly across GST Road from the Chennai International Airport, about 20 minutes from the Chennai city centre. Managed by the Oberoi Group of Hotels, the hotel is built on 5 acres (2.0 ha) of land and is the first airport hotel of the city.

items.note: Adambakkam Lake is a lake in Chennai district, Tamil Nadu. This lake gives the name for the nearby locality of Chennai, the area of Adambakkam.
Adambakkam is a neighbourhood of Chennai, India. It is primarily a residential locality situated in South Chennai.
Subramania Nagar is a residential area within Madipakkam, a southern suburb of Chennai (formerly known as Madras), in Tamil Nadu, India.
Nanganallur or Nangainallur is one of the southern neighborhoods of Chennai, India. Since September 2011, it has become a part of Chennai Corporation.

Pazhavanthangal (also called Palavanthangal or "Pallhavanthangal") is a southern neighbourhood of Chennai, India. It is served by the Pazhavanthangal railway station of the Beach-Tambaram suburban railway route in Chennai.

Charnockite, St. Thomas Mount, located to the south of the Chennai city, in Pallavaram suburb, Tamil Nadu, is a characteristically profuse exposure of quartz–feldspar–hypersthene rock, illustrated by occurrence of two pyroxene facies metamorphism.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Anjaneya Temple, Nanganallur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Anjaneya Temple, Nanganallur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Anjaneya Temple, Nanganallur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (3 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (14 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Anjaneya Temple, Nanganallur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Anjaneya Temple, Nanganallur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Anjaneya Temple, Nanganallur?
faq.a: Stays in Anjaneya Temple, Nanganallur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Anjaneya Temple, Nanganallur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Adambakkam Lake, Adambakkam, Subramania Nagar, Nanganallur, Palavanthangal.
